items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布声明：美国政府发布出口管制指令，要求暂停所有对 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的访问。相对此前的差异点是新出现合规级强制下线，比常规 deprecation 更突然。该指令导致使用 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的系统必须立即切回其他可用模型，强烈影响兼容性。
items.backend_focus: 后端行动：立刻在所有调用方把 model 字段从 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 切回 claude-opus-4-8 或 claude-sonnet 等仍可用的版本；检查 API 网关和 agent 框架中的 fallback 链是否仍指向已下线模型；关注 Anthropic 后续对该事件是否发布补偿方案。

items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国 fellowship 项目，面向早期职业人群推广 AI 社区应用。这是人才/政策类公告，不涉及模型、API 或 SDK 升级。与工程团队工作流零关联。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。与后端工程无关。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到 15+ 国家的约 150 家新组织。该项目是 AI 安全/对齐研究合作，不向外部开发者开放新的 API 能力，也未改动 SDK。已有系统兼容性零影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。不涉及 API 字段、SDK 版本或 deprecation 变化，仅是研究合作扩面。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 正式发布 Claude Opus 4.8，相对 Claude Opus 4.x 在 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作上表现更强，并持续压低推理成本。相对此前的差异点是新版本号、新能力曲线与潜在的更优性价比。建议在生产 agent/coding 场景中升级以获得更高成功率，旧 Opus 4.x 暂未公布 deprecation 时间线。
items.backend_focus: 后端行动：把 API 调用中 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-x 系列切换到 claude-opus-4-8 进行 A/B 测试，重点验证长 context、tool use 与 extended thinking 在 coding agent 上的成功率与单次调用 cost；SDK 需升到支持 Opus 4.8 的最新 anthropic-sdk-python / TypeScript SDK 版本。

items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 针对教皇利奥十四世通谕《Magnifica humanitas》发表讲话全文。这是政策与伦理层面的公开发言，不涉及模型、API、SDK 任何技术变更。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。与后端工程无关。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布首尔办公室开业并与韩国 AI 生态达成新合作。这是区域市场拓展公告，不涉及新模型、新 API 参数或 SDK 升级。对已有系统兼容性零影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。若服务此前受区域可用性限制（如部分企业合同限定美国区域），可关注首尔节点上线后是否影响数据驻留/合规选项。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首个 Anthropic Public Record 的结果，公开模型行为与安全相关数据。这是透明度报告类公告，不涉及 API 接口、SDK 版本或定价变化。已有系统兼容性零影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。不涉及可执行的后端动作；如有合规审计需求可下载报告做参考。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，把 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是渠道合作公告，不涉及新模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 升级。对使用 Claude API 的开发团队零直接影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。若团队在金融/医疗等受监管行业且走 TCS 渠道，可留意后续是否有专属部署/合规 SKU，但当前 API 调用无需任何改动。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，把 Claude 集成到银行、航司等受监管行业依赖的核心系统中。这是企业销售/集成公告，不涉及新模型或新 API 能力。已有系统兼容性零影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。开发团队无需任何代码改动；如客户询问合规部署选项，可关注 DXC-Anthropic 联合方案的 release 节奏。
